title: ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW TIGARD ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient and intensive outpatient services for adults dealing with alcohol and drug problems. Also provides a DUII Adult Addictions outpatient program for adults required to receive treatment as part of a DUII sentence. 8770 SW Scoffins Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday/Friday 7:30am-4pm, Tuesday-Thursday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 645-9010 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call FEES: We accept OHP, Medicaid or Medicare. If you need coverage, we can help you get enrolled. Some services are available on a sliding fee scale. We do not turn people away for lack of ability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday/Friday 7:30am-4pm, Tuesday-Thursday 7:30am-5:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus 76 or 78 to the corner of SW Scoffins and Main Streets Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STRENGTHENING FAMILIES PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW TIGARD
